name: Melanzana Alla Parmigiana- Eggplant Parmigina
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F/175°C.
2. Slice the eggplants into crosswise slices that are 1/2 inch (1 cm) thick.
3. Mix flour with salt, pepper, and oregano in a shallow dish.
4. Dip each eggplant slice in the beaten eggs, then coat again in the seasoned flour mixture.
5. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook eggplant slices for about one minute on each side until lightly golden.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
7. In a casserole dish, spread a thin layer of tomato sauce at the bottom.
8. Arrange a layer of eggplant slices over the sauce.
9. Sprinkle half of grated Parmesan and Mozzarella evenly over the eggplant.
10. Mix together remaining ingredients: Bechamel sauce and any leftover tomato sauce.
11. Pour this mixture over the eggplant to cover, then add another layer of eggplant slices.
12. Repeat steps 9-11 until all eggplant and sauce are used up.
13. Halve artichoke hearts and place on top of the layers.
14. Sprinkle remaining Mozzarella cheese evenly over the casserole.
15. Bake in preheated oven for about 40 minutes, or until the top is bubbling.
16. Remove from oven and let stand for 5 more minutes before serving.
17. Cut into large squares and serve.
Serves: 4
